rulesPrimary:
This market will resolve to "Yes" if any Google Gemini model achieves the listed score or greater on the FrontierMath Exam by June 30, 2026, 11:59 PM ET. Otherwise, the market will resolve to "No".

This market will resolve according to the Epoch AI’s Frontier Math benchmarking leaderboard (https://epoch.ai/frontiermath) for Tier 1-3. Studies which are not included in the leaderboard (e.g. https://x.com/EpochAIResearch/status/1945905796904005720) will not be considered.

The primary resolution source will be information from EpochAI; however, a consensus of credible reporting may also be used.

lastForecast.reasoning: All three sub-agents remain firmly aligned toward NO. The base rate of ~28% is driven substantially lower by the evidence: the best Gemini score on FrontierMath Tiers 1-3 is ~38% (Gemini 3 Pro/3.1 Pro), the global SOTA is only 52.4% (GPT-5.5 Pro), and the Epoch AI leaderboard is frozen due to fatal errors in ~1/3 of problems with no timeline for resolution — the official resolution source is operationally blocked with under 4 weeks to the June 30 deadline. Gemini 3 Deep Think, the one variant that could conceivably challenge 60%, has not been evaluated because Epoch AI lacks API access. Five resolution ambiguities warrant a modest confidence penalty but do not change the directional conclusion. Our existing NO position at avg $0.850 vs. mark $0.453 implies a fair NO value ~$0.93; the mark price has not converged within 3 cents of our forecast ($0.93 NO fair value vs. $0.547 market NO price), so we hold rather than trade or exit.

contextNotes: [cycle 1] Best official Gemini FrontierMath Tiers 1-3: ~38% (Gemini 3 Pro & 3.1 Pro, mid-2026). SOTA overall is GPT-5.5 Pro at 52.4%. 60% threshold not reached by any model.

[cycle 1] CRITICAL May 2026: Epoch AI flagged ~1/3 of FrontierMath problems have fatal errors via AI-assisted review — corrected scores pending. Could invalidate current numbers or delay leaderboard updates.

[cycle 1] Market implies ~55% YES but evidence strongly favors NO (~72%). Existing NO position at $0.85 is underwater (mark $0.453) due to YES market enthusiasm, possibly from non-leaderboard Gemini evals being conflated.
[cycle 2] Mark price $0.453 implies market now sees ~45% YES probability — still above our 15% estimate, suggesting continued NO edge but position already open
[cycle 2] Leaderboard correction freeze (1/3 fatal errors, no updated scores) is a critical blocker for resolution before June 30 deadline
[cycle 3] Best Gemini score remains 38% (Gemini 3 Pro) vs. 60% threshold; gap is ~22pp with <6 weeks to deadline.
[cycle 3] Epoch AI leaderboard frozen since 2026-05-11 with no corrected scores released — operational barrier to resolution even if a model improves.
[cycle 4] Epoch AI leaderboard still frozen as of latest check (May 11, 2026 notice); no corrected scores released — operational barrier persists with <4 weeks to deadline.
[cycle 4] NO position at avg $0.850 remains deeply in-the-money vs. mark ~$0.453; gap between fair value (~$0.90) and mark (~$0.453) exceeds 3 cents — hold, do not exit.

[cycle 5] Leaderboard freeze (May 11, 2026 notice) with no corrected scores released — official resolution source blocked with <4 weeks to deadline; YES resolution now requires both a qualifying score AND leaderboard update before June 30.
[cycle 5] Best Gemini score remains ~38% vs. 60% threshold; global SOTA (GPT-5.5 Pro at 52.4%) hasn't breached 60% either — Gemini would need to leapfrog all models by 22pp simultaneously.
